name: AngleSlider
searchText: angleslider pick angle value between 0 and 360 @mantine/core /core/angle-slider defaultvalue disabled formatlabel hiddeninputprops marks name onchange onchangeend onscrubend onscrubstart restricttomarks size step thumbsize value withlabel

props.name: formatLabel
props.description: A function to format label based on the current value

props.name: hiddenInputProps
props.description: Props passed down to the hidden input

props.name: marks
props.description: Array of marks displayed on the slider

props.name: name
props.description: Hidden input name, use with uncontrolled component

props.name: onChangeEnd
props.description: Called after the selection is finished

props.name: restrictToMarks
props.description: If set, the selection is allowed only from the given marks array

props.name: thumbSize
props.description: Size of the thumb in px. Calculated based on the size value by default.

props.name: withLabel
props.description: If set, the label is displayed inside the slider
